scripts.build: tsc -b tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p playground/server/tsconfig.json && npm --prefix playground run build
scripts.doctor: npm run build && npm run doctor:cli
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm test && npm run lint && npm run doctor:cli
scripts.release:check: npm run build && npm test && npm pack --workspace packages/core --workspace packages/report --workspace packages/validator --workspace packages/harness --workspace packages/cli --pack-destination .release
scripts.release:publish: npm publish --workspace packages/core --workspace packages/report --workspace packages/validator --workspace packages/harness --workspace packages/cli --access public
